notes: CYCLE 53: TP widening regression identified. Forward strategy: entry quality gate tightened (0.1% → 3.4% variance threshold). Rationale: root cause is weak entry signals from ADX/RSI saturation, not TP size. Deployed high-conviction entry filter. Monitoring 30-min window for WR recovery toward 50%.

cycles.fix_applied: Reverted commit 35a8ad1 (git revert dcfeb53). Root cause: Unit scale mismatch in learning system.
cycles.notes: CYCLE 52 SUCCESS then REGRESSION: Post-deploy WR hit 55.13% (goal achieved). But then hours later, TP widening fix (35→50 bps) deployed, WR regressed to 35.62%. Exit analysis shows 33% TP exits with losses = bad entry prices.

cycles.fix_applied: Entry quality gate tightened: signal_generator.py line 884 variance threshold 0.1% → 3.4%. Requires strong price movement before admitting saturation entries.
cycles.notes: CYCLE 53 FORWARD STRATEGY: No revert. Changed direction from adjusting TP to tightening entry quality. ADX/RSI saturation fires weak signals on consolidation. New gate requires 3.4% price range evidence = high conviction. Deployed via GH Actions. Next checkpoint in 30 min.
